channel.title: ai on rohanrd.xyz
channel.description: Recent content in ai on rohanrd.xyz

item.title: Artificial Intelligence
item.description: A few years from now, I think we all will have an AI at home and it will not be like existing smart home devices but an actual AI that will actually help you in day to day life. If you have not been living in a cave you have already heard about ChatGPT. One of it’s lesser known features is how it can manipulate data and display the same in proper format.

item.title: Surprising Capability of AI: Code Generation
item.description: Software development using AI is going to be a gamechanger
